__prompts__.platform_name: Human-readable platform name (match the GitOps repo)
__prompts__.project_name: Display name for the generated charts repository
__prompts__.repo_charts: GitHub repo (owner/name) this charts repo lives in - must match repo_charts in the GitOps repo
__prompts__.repo_appsets: GitHub repo (owner/name) of the GitOps AppSets repo this charts repo notifies on release
__prompts__.github_username: GitHub org or user that owns release-sensitive paths (rendered into CODEOWNERS)
__prompts__.default_branch: Default branch Argo CD's dev environment tracks and chart releases tag from
__prompts__.init_git: Initialize a git repository with an initial commit after generation
